design_philosophy.vibe: Sober, Elegant, Premium B2B, Architectural Precision
core_principles: Density is Information: Use compact rows for data, but generous padding for containers.
The 'Swiss' Grid: Strict alignment, 1px borders, minimal shadows.
Function over Decoration: Color is used only for status (Green=Good, Red=Bad, Blue=Action).
French First: All interface text, dates, and currency formats must be French (e.g., 1 234,56 €).

rules: Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for all headings (h1-h3).
Use 'Inter' for all body text, tables, and inputs.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for numeric codes (Project ID, SKU).
Tabular data (money) must use 'font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums' for alignment.

usage_rules: Backgrounds: Main content area is always #FFFFFF. Sidebar can be #F8FAFC or #0F172A (User preference: Light theme, so default to Light Sidebar with 1px border).
Borders: Use extensive 1px borders (#E2E8F0) to define structure instead of shadows.
Locked Areas: Use 'bg-slate-100' and 'text-slate-400' for locked macro budget sections.
Text: Primary text is Slate-900. Secondary text is Slate-500. Never use pure black.

layout.grid_system: Use a 12-column grid for dashboards. Gaps should be 'gap-4' (tight) for data density.
structure: Header (Top): Minimal height (64px). Breadcrumbs, Actions, User Profile.
Main Content: Scrollable area. Max-width constraint (max-w-7xl) for readability on large screens.
Data Tables: Full width. Sticky header.

buttons.default: rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-400 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm

inputs.style: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-slate-900 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto border border-slate-200 rounded-md

visual_enhancers.shadows: Very subtle. 'shadow-sm' is the default. 'shadow-md' only for dropdowns/modals.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px). Avoid fully rounded (pill) shapes for containers.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers: 'bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200'.

login_background.desc: Abstract minimalist building facade, conveys stability and structure.

empty_state_project.desc: Unfinished concrete structure, implies 'Start your project'.

instructions_to_main_agent: LANGUAGE: The entire UI must be in FRENCH. (e.g., 'Dashboard' -> 'Tableau de bord', 'Settings' -> 'Paramètres', 'Cost' -> 'Coût').
THEME: Force Light Mode. Do not implement a dark mode toggle. Use the 'class' strategy in Tailwind but default to light colors.
DATA TABLES: This is the core of the app. Use a robust table component (Tanstack Table or Shadcn Table) with sorting, filtering, and pagination.
NUMBERS: Format all currency as '1 234,00 €' (French locale).
LOCKED SECTIONS: When a macro budget envelope is locked, the inputs should be disabled and the background should be 'bg-slate-100'. Add a 'Lock' icon.
PDF EXPORT: Create a dedicated 'Print Layout' CSS or component for generating clean, signature-ready PDFs.
CHARTS: Use Recharts. Style them minimally (thin lines, small dots). Tooltips should be clean white cards with shadow.
SIDEBAR: Use a vertical sidebar on the left. Active state: 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 border-r-2 border-slate-900'. Inactive: 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-900'.
EMPTY STATES: Use the provided images for empty states (e.g., 'No Projects Found').
INITIALIZATION: The 'Project Initialization Wizard' should be a step-by-step form (stepper) with clear validation.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use density.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy (e.g., sticky headers over content).
Use glass-morphism effects only for sticky overlays.
